category_sources: source_facts.description: SASL library command-line interface; official GNU SASL page describes a SASL implementation with C library, gsasl command-line application, and manual.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU SASL project page; official GNU page title is GNU SASL Library - Libgsasl.
docs_sources: Official GNU SASL page links to manual and API reference; official GNU manual documents GNU Simple Authentication and Security Layer.
repo_sources: Official GNU SASL Development section says to clone https://gitlab.com/gsasl/gsasl.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU SASL page describe SASL authentication, the libgsasl C library, and the gsasl command-line application.
